title: Flow Design System by Skoda – UI Components
content: Flow from Directories: Components: Skoda Flow Design System is a comprehensive multi-platform framework, providing invaluable guidelines, tools, and resources. With a user-centric approach, it ensures a cohesive and visually compelling experience across various platforms, fostering efficiency and consistency in the design process. Flow empowers teams to deliver exceptional digital solutions by streamlining workflows and promoting a unified design language, ultimately enhancing user satisfaction and brand identity. Accessibility Color System Icons Layout Spacing Storybook Tokens Typography Voice and Tone Accordion Alert banner Bottom sheet Button Cards Checkbox Chip Label List Menus Modal Navigation bar Pagination Progress indicator Radio button Search Slider Snackbar Switch Tabs Text field
